steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage presents a contrast between Jaiswal and Kant's findings and Zhuang's meta-analysis. The decisive clue is the phrase “Taking all 54 studies together...suggesting that ______,” which indicates a conclusion drawn from aggregated data.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B aligns with the contrast implied by the aggregation of 54 studies showing a positive effect, which validates the doubts about Jaiswal’s small sample size. The other three either miss the contrast (A and C) or introduce unmentioned details (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
